Who We Are

Crafting Outdoor Living, Building Relationships

JV Concrete & Hardscape LLC started with a simple goal: to deliver exceptional hardscaping services with unwavering integrity. We're a family-owned business rooted in Charlotte, dedicated to enhancing our community one project at a time.

We believe in a hands-on approach, from initial consultation to final inspection. Our team prioritizes clear communication, meticulous planning, and flawless execution. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of dedication and precision.

We're proud to call Charlotte home and committed to contributing to its growth. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients, neighbors, and partners.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose JV CONCRETE & HARDSCAPE LLC

Local Expertise

Reliable Service

Dedicated project management and on-time completion.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

JV Concrete transformed our backyard in Dilworth! The new stamped concrete patio is gorgeous, and the crew was professional and efficient. They handled the red clay soil perfectly, and the drainage is excellent. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Concrete Patio
“

Our driveway in Myers Park was cracked and crumbling. JV Concrete came out and repaired it quickly and affordably. It's not perfect but a huge improvement and should last for years. Good local company.

David S. Driveway Repair
“

We had a steep slope in our backyard that was causing erosion problems. JV Concrete built a beautiful and sturdy retaining wall that solved the problem and added value to our property. Great communication throughout the process!

Jessica K. Retaining Wall
“

JV Concrete built an amazing outdoor fireplace on our patio. We've already had so many cozy evenings enjoying it. The craftsmanship is excellent, and the design perfectly complements our home. Definitely recommend them!

Robert P. Outdoor Fireplace
“

JV Concrete installed a paver walkway leading to our front door. It looks fantastic! There was a slight delay due to weather, but they kept us informed every step of the way. Very happy with the result.

Linda M. Paver Walkway
“

We had JV Concrete build our outdoor kitchen, and it's the best decision we made for our house. They handled electrical and plumbing with no issues, and it is the perfect setup for gatherings. They have an eye for detail and the craftsmanship is top tier.

Chris B. Outdoor Kitchen

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to install a concrete patio?
The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be completed within 1-2 weeks. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.
What type of maintenance is required for a concrete patio?
Concrete patios are relatively low-maintenance. Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and occasional resealing every 2-3 years will help protect the surface and keep it looking its best.
Can you install a concrete patio over an existing patio?
In some cases, we can pour a new concrete patio over an existing one, but it depends on the condition of the existing surface. We'll assess the site to determine the best approach.
